currentFocus: L1 — Mantas to populate real Stripe credentials

p1.title: Populate real Stripe credentials and verify billing flow
p1.notes: All Stripe keys in .env are REPLACE_ME. Also: add checkout.session.completed to Stripe webhook event subscriptions in dashboard.

p2.title: Implement per-tenant rate limiting via Redis
p2.notes: apps/api/src/index.ts — TODO comment; global 100 req/min only, no per-tenant isolation

p3.title: Replace console.log with Fastify logger in SMS worker
Remove TypeScript any casts in Stripe code
Add integration tests for Stripe webhook handler
p3.notes: Billing state machine completely untested in test suite

p3.title: Add password_hash to tenants table (complete password auth)
p3.notes: S1 login route issues server-signed JWTs but does not check password. Requires: ALTER TABLE tenants ADD COLUMN password_hash TEXT + migration + bcrypt verification in /auth/login.

p3.title: Implement welcome email in WF-007 provision flow
p3.notes: n8n WF-007 mentioned in docs but no email implementation exists

done.title: Docker smoke verification + compose path fix
Tighten .vercelignore
Replace localStorage demo auth with real backend session/JWT
done.notes: POST /auth/login + GET /auth/me. Server-issued JWTs replace forgeable localStorage. login.html and app.html updated. REMAINING: password_hash column needed for full password check (documented as I4).

done.title: Parameterize tenant RLS SET LOCAL query
done.notes: set_config($1, true) + UUID whitelist validation in db/client.ts

done.title: Parameterize SQL in all n8n workflows
done.notes: WF-001: Validate Inputs node (UUID/E.164 validation) + Prepare Message Data node (null-byte strip) + parameterized INSERT via queryReplacement ($1/$2/$3/$4). WF-007: DB: Save Phone Number parameterized. Manual single-quote escaping removed from message body insert.

done.title: Add auth guard to /billing/checkout
done.notes: requireAuth preHandler + cross-tenant ownership check. Returns 403 if body.tenantId !== JWT tenantId.

done.title: Validate tenantId ownership on /auth/google/start
done.notes: /auth/google/start now requires ?token=<jwt>. tenantId extracted from verified JWT — not from query param. Browser navigates with JWT in URL (acceptable for short-lived token in pilot).

done.title: Remove hardcoded N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY fallback from docker-compose
done.notes: infra/docker-compose.yml — :? syntax; docker compose fails if not set

done.title: Send service-unavailable SMS to blocked tenants
Suspend Twilio number on subscription deletion
Add admin notification for chargeback disputes
Add CORS headers to API
Run API Docker container as non-root user
WF-001 handles service-unavailable-reply job type
done.notes: Check Job Type IF node added. True branch sends Twilio SMS via httpRequest (native Twilio node broken in n8n 2.10.3). WF-001 JSON updated at n8n/workflows/twilio-sms-ingest.json.

done.title: provision-number queue has worker + WF-007 handles suspend-twilio-number
done.notes: New provision-number.worker.ts created + registered in index.ts. WF-007 updated: Suspend or Provision? IF node routes suspend jobs to DB lookup → Twilio URL clear → DB status=suspended. n8n/workflows/provision-number.json updated.

done.title: Add Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages
Add Connect Google Calendar UI flow for tenants
done.notes: connectGoogleCalendar() function added to app.html. Wired to Settings > Integrations > Google Calendar Reconnect button, Bookings calendar alert Reconnect button, and Activation Checklist reconnect CTAs. Navigates to /auth/google/start?token=<jwt>.

done.title: Add billing upgrade UI entry point
done.notes: Upgrade buttons in app.html banners point to /billing view. Actual Stripe checkout call requires L1 (real Stripe keys) to complete end-to-end. Frontend entry point exists.

done.title: Fix Stripe price ID to plan slug mapping (no silent fallback)

manualSetupRequired.title: Set real Stripe secret key + webhook secret in .env
Add checkout.session.completed to Stripe webhook event subscriptions in dashboard
Upgrade Twilio from test mode to production account
Set real Google OAuth credentials in .env (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI)
Set JWT_SECRET in .env (min 32 random chars) — required for session auth
Import updated WF-001 and WF-007 into n8n (n8n/workflows/ JSON files updated with M9/M10/S3 fixes)
manualSetupRequired.notes: Use n8n UI Import or update workflow_entity + workflow_history tables in Postgres DB
